# Sasha (Augusto) Kielbowicz

> Independent Consultant in Agentic AI, Scientific Computing, and Quantitative Systems Architecture.
> Physics background (UBA). Senior AI Engineer at AstraZeneca (Oncology R&D).
> Co-founder of Phorma (Research Software Engineering consultancy).
> Based in Buenos Aires, Argentina. Available for remote engagements globally.

## Site

- Homepage: https://ak.saxa.xyz
- Professional blog: https://ak.saxa.xyz/blog
- Personal blog: https://saxa.xyz

## Expertise

- Agentic AI platform engineering (Model Context Protocol, multi-agent orchestration)
- Enterprise integrations (OAuth 2.0 PKCE, Grant Chains, Client Credentials)
- Competitive Intelligence & Knowledge Engines (RAG, hybrid retrieval, IR trace optimization)
- Automated agent evaluation frameworks (Evals)
- High-Performance Computing (300%+ gains in production numerical systems)
- Neural Stochastic Differential Equations (NeuralSDEs) using Julia
- Domain-Specific Language (DSL) design for quantitative finance
- Research Software Engineering (RSE)

## Professional History (summary)

- AstraZeneca — Senior AI Engineer, Oncology R&D (March 2026 – present)
- Phorma — Co-founder, Research Software Engineering (February 2026 – present)
- Mercado Libre — Software Technical Lead, Financial Planning & Analytics (June 2025 – March 2026)
- SimCorp — Lead Software Engineer, Core Analytics (March 2024 – May 2025)
- Qontigo (Axioma Risk) — Associate Principal, Core Analytics (September 2020 – March 2024)
- J.P. Morgan — Technology Analyst, Rates CIB (July 2018 – August 2020)
